## Summary

List the commands you ran and the outcome.

## Risks and Follow-ups

Call out any known gaps, limitations, or next steps.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to the intended change
- [ ] Local secrets and `.env` files are not included
- [ ] Generated result artifacts are not included unless intentionally needed
- [ ] README or task examples were updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Verification commands are listed above
